creator: Martin.Birgmeier@aon.at
text:
. ie0 configured in the kernel, but does not seem to get probed
	. ie0 shows when booting with `-c' and doing an ls
	. no ie0 probe lines are shown while booting, and the kernel
	  can't start up completely because it cannot mount the root device
	  via nfs

Fix: 

unknown - seems to have been broken when if_ie.c was moved to
	its new place (booting worked in -current of 1999-10-30)
How-To-Repeat: 
	supposedly with any current kernel including ie0, even if booted
	in a normal way (i.e., from disk)
